title: AI基础设施进入系统竞争时代：从芯片战争到全栈对决
title_en: AI Infrastructure Enters the Era of Systems Competition: From Chip Wars to Full-Stack Showdown
summary: 本周，AMD发布Helios机架级AI系统、谷歌Frozen v2芯片曝光、台积电加码1000亿美元美国投资、华为Atlas 950超节点亮相WAIC——AI基础设施正从「单一芯片竞赛」全面转向「全栈系统竞争」。本文深度解析这一结构性转变，以及它对全球AI产业格局的深远影响。
summary_en: This week, AMD launched Helios rack-scale AI system, Google's Frozen v2 chip leaked, TSMC announced $100B additional US investment, and Huawei's Atlas 950 SuperPoD debuted at WAIC — AI infrastructure is undergoing a fundamental shift from 'single chip competition' to 'full-stack systems competition.' This article provides deep analysis of this structural transformation and its profound implications for the global AI industry.
author: AI News Daily
